item.title: AI-powered config inference — clawhq init --smart
steps: Implement prompt construction: system prompt that understands templates and operational dimensions
Implement Ollama integration for local LLM inference
Implement response parser: extract template selection, integration requirements, autonomy levels, boundaries
Implement conversational refinement: show plain-language summary, allow adjustments
Implement fallback to guided questionnaire when local model isn't available
Generate config from inference results using template-to-config mapper
acceptanceCriteria: User describes needs in plain language and gets a valid config proposal
Inference runs on local Ollama model (no cloud dependency)
User can adjust any aspect conversationally before generating
Falls back to guided questionnaire if Ollama isn't available
Generated config passes all validation rules
